creator: Z462vasa@mail.lviv.ua
text:
not working properly

FreeBSD 12.1-STABLE r362880 GENERIC  amd64


it doesn't work

ipnat_enable="YES"
ipnat_rules="/etc/ipnat.rules"

start
rc.local
/sbin/ipnat -CF -f /etc/ipnat.rules


ipnat.rules
rdr em0 123.123.123.123/32 port 3398   -> 192.168.3.241 port 3389
map em0 192.168.0.0/22  -> 123.123.123.123/32    portmap tcp/udp 33256:58999
map em0 192.168.0.0/22  -> 123.123.123.123/32



The recorder does not work for video (port 554).
I have to restart every day. /sbin/ipnat -CF -f /etc/ipnat.rules
